headline: GLP-1 Hydration Products Market Outlook 2036 with Key Contributions from Smoothie King, Liquid I.V., Electrolit, Abbott, Nestlé Health Science, and ADM | Future Market Insights
summary: According to the latest market analysis by Future Market Insights (FMI), the global GLP-1 hydration products market is entering a rapid expansion phase as hydration becomes a critical support category for users of GLP-1-based therapies. Growth is being driven by evolving consumption patterns, increasing focus on electrolyte balance, and rising demand for low-sugar, easy-to-consume hydration formats.
